Package jsim.api

Class SimBodyBuilder

java.lang.Object
jsim.api.SimBodyBuilder
public final class SimBodyBuilder extends Object
Fluent builder for creating SimBody instances.

Example usage: 


 SimBody robot = world.addBody(new SimBodyBuilder("Robot")
     .pose(new Pose3d(1, 2, 0.1, new Rotation3d()))
     .mass(Kilograms.of(50))
     .boxCollider(0.5, 0.4, 0.15)  // half-extents in metres
     .material(Material.CARPET)
     .noGravity());

    Description
    SimBodyBuilder(String name)
    Creates a builder for a body with the given name.

    Marks the body as static (infinite mass, never moved by the solver).

    Sets the initial pose (position + rotation) of the body.

    Sets the initial position of the body in world space.

  • Constructor Details

    • SimBodyBuilder

      public SimBodyBuilder(String name)
      Creates a builder for a body with the given name.
      Parameters:
      name - human-readable label for the body

  • Method Details

    • pose

      public SimBodyBuilder pose(edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Pose3d pose)
      Sets the initial pose (position + rotation) of the body.
      Parameters:
      pose - the initial pose in world space
      Returns:
      this builder

    • position

      public SimBodyBuilder position(double x, double y, double z)
      Sets the initial position of the body in world space.
      Parameters:
      x - position along the X axis (metres)
      y - position along the Y axis (metres)
      z - position along the Z axis (metres)
      Returns:
      this builder

    • rotation

      public SimBodyBuilder rotation(edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Rotation3d r)
      Sets the initial rotation of the body.
      Parameters:
      r - the initial orientation in world space
      Returns:
      this builder

    • linearVelocity

      public SimBodyBuilder linearVelocity(double vx, double vy, double vz)
      Sets the initial linear velocity of the body.
      Parameters:
      vx - velocity along the X axis (m/s)
      vy - velocity along the Y axis (m/s)
      vz - velocity along the Z axis (m/s)
      Returns:
      this builder

    • angularVelocity

      public SimBodyBuilder angularVelocity(double ox, double oy, double oz)
      Sets the initial angular velocity of the body.
      Parameters:
      ox - angular velocity about the X axis (rad/s)
      oy - angular velocity about the Y axis (rad/s)
      oz - angular velocity about the Z axis (rad/s)
      Returns:
      this builder

    • mass

      public SimBodyBuilder mass(double kg)
      Sets the mass of the body in kilograms.
      Parameters:
      kg - mass in kilograms (must be positive)
      Returns:
      this builder

    • mass

      public SimBodyBuilder mass(edu.wpi.first.units.measure.Mass mass)
      Sets the mass of the body from a WPILib Mass measure.
      Parameters:
      mass - the body mass
      Returns:
      this builder

    • inertia

      public SimBodyBuilder inertia(double ixx, double iyy, double izz)
      Set diagonal body-frame inertia tensor components (kg·m²). If not called, the builder estimates inertia from the mass and collider shape.
      Parameters:
      ixx - moment of inertia about the body X axis (kg·m²)
      iyy - moment of inertia about the body Y axis (kg·m²)
      izz - moment of inertia about the body Z axis (kg·m²)
      Returns:
      this builder

    • sphereCollider

      public SimBodyBuilder sphereCollider(double radius)
      Attaches a sphere collider and estimates inertia from mass and radius.
      Parameters:
      radius - sphere radius in metres; must be positive
      Returns:
      this builder

    • boxCollider

      public SimBodyBuilder boxCollider(double halfX, double halfY, double halfZ)
      Attaches a box collider and estimates inertia from mass and half-extents.
      Parameters:
      halfX - half-width along the X axis (metres)
      halfY - half-width along the Y axis (metres)
      halfZ - half-width along the Z axis (metres)
      Returns:
      this builder

    • planeCollider

      public SimBodyBuilder planeCollider(double nx, double ny, double nz, double offset)
      Infinite half-space floor/wall. Automatically sets STATIC flag.
      Parameters:
      nx - normal X component (will be normalized)
      ny - normal Y component
      nz - normal Z component
      offset - signed distance from the body origin to the plane surface along the normal
      Returns:
      this builder

    • collider

      public SimBodyBuilder collider(ColliderShape shape)
      Attaches a custom collider shape.
      Parameters:
      shape - the collider to attach
      Returns:
      this builder

    • material

      public SimBodyBuilder material(Material m)
      Sets the surface material used for contact response.
      Parameters:
      m - the surface material
      Returns:
      this builder

    • robotId

      public SimBodyBuilder robotId(RobotId id)
      Tag this body as an FRC robot at the given alliance station. The body can then be retrieved from the world with SimWorld.findRobot(RobotId).
      Parameters:
      id - the alliance-station identity to assign
      Returns:
      this builder

    • isStatic

      public SimBodyBuilder isStatic()
      Marks the body as static (infinite mass, never moved by the solver).
      Returns:
      this builder

    • noGravity

      public SimBodyBuilder noGravity()
      Disables gravity for this body.
      Returns:
      this builder

    • noCollision

      public SimBodyBuilder noCollision()
      Disables collision detection for this body.
      Returns:
      this builder

    • fixedRotation

      public SimBodyBuilder fixedRotation()
      Prevents rotational integration, keeping orientation constant.
      Returns:
      this builder
